title: lachnagrostis palustris
intro: Lachnagrostis palustris, also known as marsh grass or salt grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the wetlands of Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The health benefits of Lachnagrostis palustris include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
